description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical bottle with a matte black finish and a slightly faceted base, designed for personal care use. The front features the LYNX brand logo in bold white and gold, along with the product name 'Dark Temptation' and additional descriptive text in smaller fonts. The cap is a robust, black plastic spray top with a rectangular actuator, typical of aerosol dispensers. The bottle's silhouette is sleek and modern, with subtle angular transitions from the body to the cap. Minimal graphic elements are present aside from the logo and text, giving it a clean, contemporary appearance. The overall construction suggests a lightweight, portable container suitable for urban environments.
description: A tall, matte black cylindrical bottle with a spray cap and bold LYNX branding, featuring minimal graphics and a modern silhouette.
description_view_0: Front view showing the LYNX logo, product name, and all label text clearly, with the spray cap and actuator visible.
description_view_1: Rear angled view showing the plain black back of the bottle and the cap, with no visible text or graphics.
description_view_2: Direct rear view displaying the unadorned back and the full height of the cap, with no branding or label visible.
description_view_3: Side-rear view showing a partial glimpse of the front label and logo, with most of the bottle surface plain and black.
attribute_brand_logo: LYNX logo in white and gold with a circular motif above the brand name.
attribute_label_text: LYNX DARK TEMPTATION DEODORANT & BODY SPRAY FRESH
attribute_bottle_silhouette: tall and cylindrical with a slightly faceted base and a squared-off spray cap
attribute_packaging_graphics: Circular swirl motif above the logo; otherwise minimalistic with no additional graphics.
